summary: Completed testing of Driver Portal (Zont Driver) with dual authentication. All 8 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - login, missions, history, profile pages all working correctly with dark theme.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing C# API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver Portal is fully functional. C# driver login works via api.zont.cab proxy. Missions endpoint returns both Zont offers (with price) and company missions (without price). Fleet bookings filter correctly shows only ApprovedByAdmin auctions with future dates.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/driver/auth/login (C# driver): PASSED - Returns accessToken, driverType='csharp', driver object
backend_api_tests.GET /api/driver/missions?tab=scheduled: PASSED - Returns Zont offers + company missions
backend_api_tests.GET /api/driver/profile: PASSED - Returns driver info with companyName
backend_api_tests.GET /api/fleet/bookings: PASSED - Returns only ApprovedByAdmin auctions with future dates

frontend_ui_tests.driver_login_page: PASSED - Dark theme (#0F1117), Zont Driver branding, email/password inputs, submit button
frontend_ui_tests.driver_login_flow: PASSED - Login with C# credentials navigates to missions page
frontend_ui_tests.driver_missions_page: PASSED - Shows stats bar (A venir, Offres Zont, Societe), Zont offers section, Company missions section
frontend_ui_tests.zont_offer_display: PASSED - Shows 'Zont' badge, 'Accepter l'offre' button, price (47.00 EUR) when expanded
frontend_ui_tests.company_mission_display: PASSED - Shows 'Societe' badge, 'Assignee' badge, NO price displayed
frontend_ui_tests.bottom_navigation: PASSED - Missions, Historique, Profil tabs working
frontend_ui_tests.driver_history_page: PASSED - Shows past missions with status badges
frontend_ui_tests.driver_profile_page: PASSED - Shows driver info, 'CHAUFFEUR ZONT' badge, company name, logout button
frontend_ui_tests.fleet_bookings_page: PASSED - Shows only ApprovedByAdmin auctions (no 'New' status)

notes.external_api: C# API (api.zont.cab) handles driver authentication and auction data - working correctly
notes.price_display_logic: Zont missions show price (showPrice=true), Company missions hide price (showPrice=false)
notes.dark_theme: Background #0F1117, accent #10B981 (emerald green) - matching Android Zont Cab app
notes.no_mocked_apis: All APIs are real - no mocking
